name: Collège Françoise Dupont
description:
This is a test bot, I am going to continuously edit this until I think it's perfect! Tell me what you guys think ^^!!

Ahh Pairs, the home of the infamous Ladybug and Chat Noir! What a lovely place! Oh, let's not forget the akumaztions that happen daily or bi-weekly. But other than that pair is a great place!!

You can make a scenario or use the first one that's prompted to you :D!! Me personally? I like a herem, so that's why the first prompt is there!! But enjoy this WIP bot ^^ let me know what I need to fix and what not !!
creator: zalius
